caption: A bald man wearing a white collared shirt and a dark blazer speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned in front of a blurred background where several people, including one in a white shirt and another in a green shirt, are visible. A small headset microphone is attached to his cheek. On-screen graphics appear at the bottom of the scene. In the initial frames, the text identifies him as "SANJEEV MOHAN" and lists his title as "Principal, SanjMo | @SanjMo", while mentioning "theCUBE" and the location "From the Javits Center, New York, NY". A logo for "MongoDB" is displayed on the right under the heading "Sponsored By". In the final frame, the name "SANJEEV MOHAN" is replaced by "MONGODB WORLD 2022" and the hashtag "#MDW22 | #theCUBE". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift and his hands move from his sides to an active gesturing position.
